arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta vows to keep Liverpool waiting for title
arts.sum: Liverpool will claim the title with five matches remaining if Arsenal lose against Ipswich at Portman Road and they see off Leicester on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arteta confirms Arsenal injury boost ahead of Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta confirmed that Kai Havertz is set to hand the team a major injury boost and is on course to make his comeback “earlier than expected”.

arts.ttl: The Arsenal and PSG players banned for Champions League clash as UEFA suspension rules explained
arts.sum: Spain international Fabian Ruiz was the only PSG player to go into the quarter-final second leg with Aston Villa last week on two yellow cards, but he avoided being cautioned. Partey is the second Arsenal player to be suspended in the Champions League this season after picking up three yellow cards.

arts.ttl: New €100m price tag: Liverpool & Arsenal transfer target still “likely” to move this summer
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal may reportedly now have to pay even more for the potential transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike. The talented Frenchman has been in prolific form this season, scoring 21 goals in all competitions so far, and is expected to seal a move to a bigger club this summer. arts.ttl: ‘Why are you doing this?’: Micah Richards stumped after what he’s just been asked about Arsenal’s Declan Rice
arts.sum: Real Madrid were knocked out of the Champions League by Arsenal this week as the Gunners dominated Los Blancos over two legs. Madrid were expected...

arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique sends Arsenal five-word Champions League semi-final warning
arts.sum: “And the path to achieving that goal is important, so what matters, perhaps more than the results, is the work. Speaking in his pre-match press conference ahead of the Ligue 1 clash against Le Harve, Enrique appeared to point towards his aspirations to win the Champions League.

arts.ttl: ‘I overdid it’: £10m player says he put on too much weight when he was at Arsenal
arts.sum: Footballers are finely tuned machines that need to be micro-managed in almost every single way. Indeed, players’ training regimes and diets need to be controlled...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops big hint over Thomas Partey's Arsenal future
arts.sum: Thomas Partey's Arsenal contract is up in the summer and the expectation had been that he will leave north London on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: 'He's learning more and more': Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have a top player who's set to have a 'bigger and bigger' role
arts.sum: Arsenal are enjoying a superb season and Declan Rice has played a huge role in getting the Gunners to where they are right now. The...

arts.ttl: Arsenal suffer Martin Zubimendi blow as midfielder's 'priority' revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly suffer a blow in their pursuit to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi amid rival interest from Real Madrid.
